glosses.vi: ra ngoài lần nữa; nổi bật
glosses.nb: gå ut igjen; skille seg ut
glosses.ro: a ieși din nou; a se remarca
glosses.da: gå ud igen; skille sig ud
glosses.ja: もう一度外に出る; 目立つ

translations.en: I'm going back out to buy bread.
translations.es: Voy a salir otra vez a comprar pan.
translations.de: Ich gehe nochmal raus, um Brot zu kaufen.
translations.it: Esco di nuovo a comprare il pane.
translations.pt: Vou sair de novo para comprar pão.
translations.vi: Tôi lại ra ngoài mua bánh mì.
translations.nl: Ik ga weer naar buiten om brood te kopen.
translations.hi: मैं फिर बाहर ब्रेड खरीदने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βγαίνω πάλι έξω για να αγοράσω ψωμί.
translations.nb: Jeg går ut igjen for å kjøpe brød.
translations.id: Aku keluar lagi untuk membeli roti.
translations.sv: Jag går ut igen för att köpa bröd.
translations.ro: Ies din nou să cumpăr pâine.
translations.da: Jeg går ud igen for at købe brød.
translations.ja: パンを買いにまた出る。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; the grammatical subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; intransitive here, meaning ‘go out again’, taking an infinitival complement of purpose.
Bare infinitive functioning as a purpose/complement infinitive (‘to buy’), with an understood subject coreferential with the matrix subject.
Partitive determiner (de+le) introducing a mass noun; marks an indefinite quantity.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive ‘acheter’.

sentences.target: On va ressortir après le dîner.

translations.fr: On va ressortir après le dîner.
translations.en: We're going back out after dinner.
translations.es: Vamos a salir otra vez después de cenar.
translations.de: Wir gehen nach dem Abendessen wieder raus.
translations.pt: Vamos sair de novo depois do jantar.
translations.tr: Akşam yemeğinden sonra tekrar dışarı çıkacağız.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ lại ra ngoài sau bữa tối.
translations.nl: We gaan na het avondeten weer naar buiten.
translations.hi: हम रात के खाने के बाद फिर बाहर जाएंगे.
translations.el: Θα βγούμε πάλι μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Vi går ut igjen etter middag.
translations.id: Kami akan keluar lagi setelah makan malam.
translations.sv: Vi går ut igen efter middagen.
translations.da: Vi går ud igen efter aftensmaden.
translations.ja: 夕食のあとにまた出かける。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun; generic/informal ‘we’; grammatical subject of the auxiliary.
Auxiliary verb (present 3rd person singular) forming the near future (futur proche) with an infinitive complement.
Infinitive main verb complement of ‘va’; denotes the planned action.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘dîner’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘après’ within the temporal phrase.

sentences.target: Ça ressort trop sur ce mur.

translations.fr: Ça ressort trop sur ce mur.
translations.en: It stands out too much on this wall.
translations.de: Das fällt an dieser Wand zu sehr auf.
translations.zh-Hans: 它在这面墙上太显眼了。
translations.ru: Это слишком выделяется на этой стене.
translations.pt: Isso se destaca demais nesta parede.
translations.he: זה בולט מדי על הקיר הזה.
translations.vi: Nó nổi bật quá trên bức tường này.
translations.ar: إنه يبرز كثيرًا على هذا الجدار.
translations.nl: Op deze muur valt het te veel op.
translations.uk: Воно надто сильно вирізняється на цій стіні.
translations.hi: यह इस दीवार पर बहुत ज़्यादा उभरता है.
translations.pl: Za bardzo się wyróżnia na tej ścianie.
translations.el: Ξεχωρίζει πάρα πολύ σε αυτόν τον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Det skiller seg for mye ut på denne veggen.
translations.id: Itu terlalu mencolok di dinding ini.
translations.sv: Det sticker ut för mycket på den här väggen.
translations.ro: Iese prea mult în evidență pe peretele acesta.
translations.cs: Na této zdi to příliš vyčnívá.
translations.da: Det skiller sig for meget ud på denne væg.
translations.ja: この壁では目立ちすぎる。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; here with the sense ‘to stand out/show through’, taking a locative complement.
Degree adverb modifying the verb; indicates excess.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying ‘mur’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Il ressort avec la vieille guitare.

translations.fr: Il ressort avec la vieille guitare.
translations.en: He goes back out with the old guitar.
translations.es: Sale otra vez con la guitarra vieja.
translations.de: Er geht wieder mit der alten Gitarre raus.
translations.it: Esce di nuovo con la vecchia chitarra.
translations.ko: 그는 오래된 기타를 들고 다시 나간다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他又带着那把旧吉他出门。
translations.yue: 佢攞住嗰把舊結他再出去。
translations.ru: Он снова выходит со старой гитарой.
translations.pt: Ele sai de novo com a guitarra velha.
translations.he: הוא יוצא שוב עם הגיטרה הישנה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lại ra ngoài với cây đàn cũ.
translations.ar: يخرج مرة أخرى ومعه الغيتار القديم.
translations.nl: Hij gaat weer naar buiten met de oude gitaar.
translations.uk: Він знову виходить зі старою гітарою.
translations.hi: वह पुरानी गिटार लेकर फिर बाहर जाता है.
translations.pl: On znowu wychodzi ze starą gitarą.
translations.el: Βγαίνει πάλι έξω με την παλιά κιθάρα.
translations.nb: Han går ut igjen med den gamle gitaren.
translations.id: Dia keluar lagi dengan gitar tua itu.
translations.sv: Han går ut igen med den gamla gitarren.
translations.ro: Iese din nou cu chitara veche.
translations.cs: Znovu jde ven se starou kytarou.
translations.da: Han går ud igen med den gamle guitar.
translations.fi: Hän menee taas ulos vanhan kitaran kanssa.
translations.ja: 彼は古いギターを持ってまた出ていく。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; grammatical subject of the verb.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; here meaning ‘comes/goes out again’, followed by a prepositional complement.
Preposition introducing an accompanying/instrumental complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘guitare’.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies ‘guitare’; irregular feminine form of ‘vieux’.
Common noun; complement of the preposition ‘avec’ within the PP.
